---
title: "Project 2"
author: "Evan Whitfield"
format: html
---
```{r}
#Load in libraries
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(gt)
library(ggplot2)
library(shiny)
library(DT)
library(bslib)
library(ggridges)

```


# Data Exploration

```{r}
nfl_data <- read_csv("data/NFL_play_data.csv") |>
  rename(yards_gained = Yards.Gained) |>
  #Need to change the name of a couple of teams to make sure that there are only 32 teams listed.
  mutate(
    across(
      c(posteam, DefensiveTeam, HomeTeam, AwayTeam),
      ~ recode(
        .x,
        "STL" = "LA",
        "JAC" = "JAX"
      )
    )
  )

```


```{r}
dim(nfl_data)
colnames(nfl_data)
```
```{r}
unique(nfl_data$PlayType)

table(nfl_data$PlayType)
```


```{r}
CAR2015_play_type_table <- nfl_data |>
  filter(posteam == "CAR", Season == "2015") |>
  count(PlayType) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Frequency of Play Types"
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    PlayType = "Play Type",
    n = "Count"
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  ) |>
  opt_row_striping()

CAR2015_play_type_table
```
```{r}
CAR2015_play_down_data <- nfl_data |>
  filter(!PlayType %in% c("End of Game", 
                          "Extra Point", 
                          "Half End", 
                          "Kickoff", 
                          "Quarter End",
                          "Two Minute Warning",
                          "Timeout",
                          "No Play"),
         posteam == "CAR",
         Season == "2015")
```



```{r}
CAR2015_play_table <- CAR2015_play_down_data |>
  count(PlayType, down) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = down,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  )

CAR2015_play_table
```


```{r}
WPA_sum_table <- CAR2015_play_down_data |>
  group_by(PlayType) |>
  summarize(
    Mean = mean(WPA, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median = median(WPA, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(WPA, na.rm = TRUE),
    Minimum = min(WPA, na.rm = TRUE),
    Maximum = max(WPA, na.rm = TRUE),
    Count = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  gt() |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(Mean, Median, SD, Minimum, Maximum),
    decimals = 4
  ) |>
  tab_header(
    title = "WPA Summary by Play Type"
  )

WPA_sum_table
```


```{r}
EPA_sum_table <- CAR2015_play_down_data |>
  group_by(PlayType) |>
  summarize(
    Mean = mean(EPA, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median = median(EPA, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(EPA, na.rm = TRUE),
    Minimum = min(EPA, na.rm = TRUE),
    Maximum = max(EPA, na.rm = TRUE),
    Count = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  gt() |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(Mean, Median, SD, Minimum, Maximum),
    decimals = 4
  ) |>
  tab_header(
    title = "EPA Summary by Play Type"
  )

EPA_sum_table
```

```{r}
ggplot(
  CAR2015_play_down_data |> filter(PlayType == "Run", !is.na(EPA)),
  aes(x = EPA)
) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.25) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of EPA for Running Plays",
    x = "Expected Points Added (EPA)",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  xlim(-8, 8) +
```

```{r}
ggplot(
  CAR2015_play_down_data |> filter(PlayType == "Pass", !is.na(EPA)),
  aes(x = EPA)
) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.25) +
  xlim(-8,8) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of EPA for Pass Plays",
    x = "Expected Points Added (EPA)",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
ggplot(
  CAR2015_play_down_data |> filter(PlayType == "Pass", !is.na(WPA)),
  aes(x = WPA)
) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.025) +
  xlim(-0.25, 0.25) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of WPA for Pass Plays",
    x = "Win Probability Added (WPA)",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(
  CAR2015_play_down_data |> filter(PlayType == "Run", !is.na(WPA)),
  aes(x = WPA)
) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.025) +
  xlim(-0.2, 0.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of WPA for Run Plays",
    x = "Win Probability Added (WPA)",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```




```{r}
ggplot(
  CAR2015_play_down_data |> filter(PlayType == "Pass", !is.na(EPA)),
  aes(x = EPA, fill = PassOutcome)
) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.25) +
  xlim(-8,8) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of EPA for Pass Plays by Pass Outcome",
    x = "Expected Points Added (EPA)",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
play_type_down_counts <- CAR2015_play_down_data |>
  count(down, PlayType) |>
  group_by(down) |>
  arrange(desc(n)) 

play_type_counts <- CAR2015_play_down_data |>
  count(PlayType) |>
  arrange(desc(n))
```


```{r}
ggplot(play_type_counts,
       aes(x = reorder(PlayType, -n), y = n, fill = PlayType)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = n),
    vjust = -0.5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Carolina Panthers 2015 Season Play Types",
    x = "Play Type",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r}
ggplot(play_type_down_counts |> filter(!is.na(down)),
       aes(x = reorder(PlayType, -n),
           y = n,
           fill = PlayType)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~down) +
  labs(
    title = "Play Type Distribution by Down for Carolina Panthers in 2015",
    x = "Play Type",
    y = "Number of Plays"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```


```{r}
ggplot(CAR2015_play_down_data,
       aes(PlayType,
           ScoreDiff,
           fill = PlayType)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Score Difference When Play Type Called",
    x = "Play Type",
    y = "Score Difference"
  ) + 
  theme(legend.position = "None",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

```


```{r}
ggplot(CAR2015_play_down_data |> filter(PassOutcome == "Complete"),
       aes(AirYards,
           yards_gained,
           color = factor(Touchdown))) +
  geom_point(alpha = .67) +
  scale_color_discrete(
    name = "Result",
    labels = c("No Touchdown", "Touchdown")) +
  labs(
    title = "Yards Gained vs. Air Yards",
    x = "Air Yards",
    y = "Yards Gained"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(CAR2015_play_down_data |> filter(PassOutcome == "Complete"),
       aes(AirYards,
           YardsAfterCatch,
           color = factor(Touchdown))) +
  geom_point(alpha = .5) +
  scale_color_discrete(
    name = "Result",
    labels = c("No Touchdown", "Touchdown")) +
  labs(
    title = "YAC vs. Air Yards",
    x = "Air Yards",
    y = "Yard After Catch",
  )
```






```{r}

CAR2015_play_down_data |>
  filter(!is.na(EPA)) |>
  ggplot(aes(
    x = EPA,
    y = PlayType,
    fill = PlayType
  )) +
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of EPA by Play Type",
    x = "Expected Points Added (EPA)",
    y = "Play Type"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "None")
```


```{r}

CAR2015_play_down_data |>
  filter(!is.na(EPA)) |>
  ggplot(aes(
    x = WPA,
    y = PlayType,
    fill = PlayType
  )) +
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of WPA by Play Type",
    x = "Win Probability Added",
    y = "Play Type"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "None")
```
